changelog: Removed the extra Depth Preview File Output workaround.
Depth Pass Viewer now looks for HL2_Viewer_Depth and shows it in the Image Editor.
Camera background image is shown in FRONT.
Camera BG Opacity was moved under Fill Principled.
BaseColor, Roughness and Metallic exports now use the actual input connected to the Principled shader.
Test Maps displacement scale is now 1.0.
